headline: Constellation Energy Deepens RNG Push With Pine Creek Deal After Calpine
summary: Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) has entered a new long term partnership with Pine Creek RNG to expand its presence in renewable natural gas. The agreement adds another pillar to Constellation Energy's clean energy offering, building on its recent Calpine acquisition. The Pine Creek RNG deal is intended to support low carbon energy supply for data center operators and customers focused on decarbonization. For you as an investor, this move adds more detail to what Constellation Energy...

headline: Vinson & Elkins: Accelerating AI Infrastructure & Power Constraints Reshape the Market
summary: By Karen Roman The growing tension between AI-driven data center development and power availability constraints is reshaping the market, according to a survey published by Vinson & Elkins. The survey also found 96% of infrastructure developers preview power constraints to pivot data center development to new locations, while more than 80% are adopting hybrid and […]

headline: Constellation and Pine Creek RNG Announce Equity Purchase Agreement in RNG Facilities
summary: BALTIMORE, May 14, 2026--Constellation (Nasdaq: CEG), the largest producer of clean energy in the U.S. and a leading supplier of energy products and services, and Pine Creek RNG, an independent developer, owner, and operator of renewable natural gas (RNG) production assets, today announced a long-term agreement that includes Constellation’s purchase of a minority equity interest in five operating Pine Creek RNG production facilities.
